{{Infobox concept
| name = Void Icon
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Void Icon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Void]] [[Icon]] is a powerful symbol representing the concept of nothingness, nonexistence, and hunger. Unlike other [[Icons]] that represent physical attributes like strength, the Void [[Icon]] is defined by its ability to subtract, remove, or negate. It functions as an authority that allows a user to strip away illusions, erase wounds by reducing them to nothing, and remove obstructions or hide certain possibilities from [[fate]]. It can also be used to [[veil]] a person's spirit from being scanned. The [[Icon]] is characterized by an intense, yawning hunger and a sense of emptiness that can resonate with the user's spirit or influence their emotions, providing a cooling effect on thoughts or fueling a cold, deep anger. While it lacks dominion over physical power, it can harmonize with destructive wills and even resonate with other concepts like death. A person connected to this [[Icon]] may be referred to as a [[Void Sage]]. Visually, the [[Icon]] has been represented by a single character on a badge or as an endless abyss and a hole in the sky.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] manifested the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Void Icon]] is an object that requires insight to touch.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] reached out for the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Void]] [[Icon]] is a concept or realm characterized by a strong connection to spatial abilities and a yawning hunger. When [[Lindon]] aligned himself to this entity, he was able to extend his perception and sense the surrounding world as material to be consumed or vessels to be drained. He experienced an easy resonance with the icon, even using it to sense the suction of an ancient authority within a [[labyrinth]]. While the fury of the icon eventually faded, it remained linked to the process of pulling something into existence from nothingness and resonated with the hunger surrounding [[Lindon]]. Other individuals, such as [[Reigan Shen]] and [[Ziel]], also shared connections or associations with the icon's nature.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Void Icon]] has a good connection to spatial abilities.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] aligned himself to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Touching the [[Void Icon]] allows [[Lindon]] to feel everything around him as vessels that can be drained or material that can be consumed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Void Icon]] is a realm or concept mentioned by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Void Icon]] to extend his perception.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was open to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The hunger in the [[labyrinth]] reminded [[Ziel]] of the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The fury of the [[Void Icon]] faded.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The process of pulling something into existence from nothingness resonates with the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] felt an easy resonance with the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can sense the suction of the ancient authority in the [[labyrinth]] through the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] has a connection to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Void Icon]] resonates with the hunger all around [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Void Icon]] has a yawning hunger.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] felt something overwhelming from the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An endless abyss, the Void [[Icon]] possesses the purview to remove alterations and strip away illusions. When [[Lindon]] reaches out to the icon for comfort and support, his anger resonates with its depths. During a confrontation, the entity wiped out the dream and was utilized by [[Lindon]] for concealment. While it lacks domain over physical power, the icon can empower a [[dragon]]'s breath and serves as a tool for removing obstacles or hiding things. [[Lindon]] eventually seeks information regarding the icon within the [[Dreamway]], noting its ability to shroud possibilities even from [[Monarchs]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] has the purview to remove alterations.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] reaches out to the [[Void Icon]] for comfort and support.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] can be used to strip away illusions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] is an endless abyss.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] wiped out the dream.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s anger resonates with the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Void Icon]] for concealment.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] is useful for removing obstacles and hiding things.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] can be used to shroud possibilities from [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is looking for information regarding the [[Void Icon]] in the [[Dreamway]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] has no domain over physical power.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Icon]] can empower a [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Void]] [[Icon]] initially provided [[Lindon]] with information regarding his location within the [[void]] and established contact with him. An indistinct version of the icon eventually hovered above [[Lindon]]'s head, matching his eyes and exerting a felt power. This entity possesses the ability to shroud or cloud possible futures, an effect that whispered around [[Lindon]] and influenced his thoughts while leaving him with a sensation of cold. During combat, the icon's nature to subtract or remove was used to obscure the future, though [[Lindon]] struggled to apply its power to treat restoration as a form of removing damage. Ultimately, the icon's authority helped [[Lindon]] [[construct]] a meeting-space and restore a house, eventually resonating with the [[Death Icon]] and showing approval of [[Lindon]]'s actions.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] provides information about [[Lindon]]'s position in the [[void]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] had contact with the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] matches [[Lindon]]'s eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An indistinct [[Void Icon]] hovered over [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]]'s power is felt with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] appears above [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] has the ability to shroud possible futures.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] glared at [[Reigan Shen]] with the intensity of the Void and Dragon [[Icons]] combined.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] whispered around [[Lindon]], clouding his future.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] affects [[Lindon]]'s thoughts and leaves him feeling cold.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] was used to obscure the future during the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The nature of the [[Void Icon]] is to subtract or remove.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] could not figure out how to make the [[Void Icon]] recognize bringing something back from total destruction as removing damage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] can be used to restore a house.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] approved of [[Lindon]]'s actions.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]] resonated with the [[Death Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Void Icon]]'s authority was used by [[Lindon]] to [[construct]] a meeting-space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Silverlord has a similarity to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|While [[Lindon]] holds the Void [[Icon]], its authority suffuses his techniques and provides him with a sense of comfort. He utilizes the artifact to mask his internal thoughts from others. The [[Icon]] possesses an inherent desire to bring something out of nothing, granting [[Lindon]] the senses required to feel the shaping of materials within the Void. During his efforts, [[Lindon]] taps into the power of the Void [[Icon]] in conjunction with the [[Hammer Icon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Void Icon]] provides comfort to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The authority of the [[Void Icon]] suffused [[Lindon]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] holds the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Void Icon]] to mask his thoughts.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Void Icon]] provides [[Lindon]] with senses that allow him to feel the process of shaping materials in the Void.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] tapped into the [[Hammer Icon]] and the [[Void Icon]] together.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Void Icon]] possesses the desire to bring something out of nothing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Lindon took the badge. “I manifested the Void Icon.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
